summary: Functional deliverable with solid error handling and clear structure, but violates PowerShell conventions and introduces workflow duplication. Main issue: New-BuildMatrix.ps1 missing Set-StrictMode (best practice). Pester installation duplicated in workflow jobs ~26–29 and ~47–50—should extract to composite action. Run-ActTests.ps1 is one monolithic act test case (though comprehensive with multiple assertions). Missing parameter validation decorators on ConfigPath/MaxMatrixSize. Workflow YAML is well-structured with proper pinning and permissions.
